mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO reliable_mq_replay_record( event_id, consumer_name, original_queue, original_exchange, original_routing_key, payload_type, payload_json, status, attempt, next_retry_at, last_error, create_time, update_time ) VALUES( #{eventId}, #{consumerName}, #{originalQueue}, #{originalExchange}, #{originalRoutingKey}, #{payloadType}, #{payloadJson}, #{status}, #{attempt}, #{nextRetryAt}, #{lastError}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, event_id AS eventId, consumer_name AS consumerName, original_queue AS originalQueue, original_exchange AS originalExchange, original_routing_key AS originalRoutingKey, payload_type AS payloadType, payload_json AS payloadJson, status, attempt, next_retry_at AS nextRetryAt, last_error AS lastError, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM reliable_mq_replay_record WHERE status IN ('PENDING', 'RETRY_PENDING') AND next_retry_at <= #{now} ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE reliable_mq_replay_record SET attempt = #{attempt}, next_retry_at = #{nextRetryAt}, last_error = #{lastError}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
